# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: "3"
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: es
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
      - 9300:9300
    environment:
      - node.name=es
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=es:9300
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    networks:
      - elk-network

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    ports:
      - 5000:5000
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    volumes:
      - ./logstash-conf.d:/usr/share/logstash/config/
    environment:
      - INFLUXDB_URL=influxdb://influxdb:8086
      - LSIMD_MAX_THREADS=2
    networks:
      - elk-network

  beats:
    image: docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat:7.10.2
    container_name: filebeat
    ports:
      - 5044:5044
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    volumes:
      - ./filebeat.yml:/usr/share/filebeat/filebeat.yml
      - /var/log:/var/log
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://es:9200
      - XPACK_MONITORING_ENABLED=true
    networks:
      - elk-network

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://es:9200
    networks:
      - elk-network

  apm:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apmserver:7.10.2
    container_name: apm
    ports:
      - 8200:8200
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://es:9200
    networks:
      - elk-network

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
